inputs.name: jwt
inputs.description: String . The token from which you want to extract claims.

inputs.name: truststoreAlias
inputs.description: String . Optional. Alias of the truststore that contains the list of certificates, which Integration Server uses to verify the JWT before extracting the claims.

inputs.name: certAlias
inputs.description: String . Optional. Alias that identifies a trusted certificate within a truststore.

inputs.name: claims
inputs.description: String[] . List of claims to be extracted.

outputs.name: message
outputs.description: String . Indicates whether the claims are successfully extracted or not. A success message or an error message followed by the details of claims extracted are displayed.

outputs.name: claimsDetails
outputs.description: Document . The service returns an array or a list of name and value pairs for each claim.
